stages.label: Spec Baseline
stages.description: FINAL US REGION BASELINE: 75 docs, 17 slice PRDs, 25 ADRs, 22 invariants frozen.
stages.exit: Reviewer Brief signed off; Promotion Ledger entry recorded.

stages.label: Engineering Bootstrap
stages.description: Code repo init, CI, CLAUDE.md from EHBG §13, IaC skeleton, secrets, baseline RLS migration.
stages.exit: Repo green on CI; tenant_id RLS policy enforces on every PHI table.

stages.label: Foundation Build
stages.description: Auth/Identity, RBAC, KMS-per-tenant, Audit append-only, CCR runtime, Forms Engine, AI service skeleton.
stages.exit: Invariants I-019 / I-023…I-027 verifiably enforced end-to-end.

stages.label: Slice Build
stages.description: 17 slice PRDs implemented in EHBG sprint order. Modular monolith; AI Service separated.
stages.exit: All slices ship behind feature flags with green smoke + contract tests.

stages.label: Internal Alpha
stages.description: Two-tenant smoke (Heros Health greenfield + Telecheck-Ghana pilot). Synthetic patients only.

stages.label: Pilot
stages.description: Real users, scoped cohorts. Ghana Launch Playbook v1.2 enacted. Crisis-detection drills.
stages.exit: Adverse-event reporting closed-loop; SLOs met for 30 days.

stages.label: GA Launch
stages.description: Public availability per Market Launch contract. us-east-1 primary, us-west-2 cold DR (ADR-026).
stages.exit: Launch retro published; on-call rotation steady-state.

stages.label: Scale & Iterate
stages.description: New countries via CCR, additional tenants, slice extraction from monolith as boundaries warrant.

areas.name: AI Clinical Assistant
areas.notes: Mode 1 + Mode 2 architecture per ADR-002.

areas.name: Admin Backend
areas.notes: v1.1 promoted. DB layer (migrations 039-044) COMPLETE + Codex-reviewed; app-layer skeleton only (src/modules/admin-backend = types.ts). Sprint 2 handlers (submit + decision + crisis-dashboard) BLOCKED on app-role acquisition (Addendum 76): telecheck_app_role holds no EXECUTE on the admin SECDEF wrappers (granted ONLY to admin_basic_operator / admin_template_reviewer) and no mechanism grants it — the 003:164 `006_roles.sql` foundation gap. NEW hard-floor item 6 ERR: Engineering-Review-Request-App-Role-Acquisition-SECDEF-Slice-Wrappers-2026-05-23.md (4 options; Claude rec Option B NOINHERIT + per-tx SET LOCAL ROLE; Codex consult DEFERRED — remote env). Same blocker gates Crisis Response Sprint 2. Awaiting Evans ratifier decision; co-ratifiable with the Med-Interaction role-name ERR.

areas.name: Medication Interaction Engine
areas.notes: SI-019 v2.0 RATIFIED (P-033) + CDM v1.6→v1.7 (P-034). DB layer PRs 1-6 MERGED to telecheck-app main 5da9766 (Evans's local session). LATENT DEFECT live on main: migrations 047/048/049/050 (+ rollbacks 049/050) reference slice-prefixed role names (interaction_signal_*_owner; 81 sites/6 files) but migration 046 creates BARE names per spec P-034 §8 (CDM v1.7 §4.NEW3 line 197) — fresh 000→047 chain aborts. ERR AUTHORED (Addendum 75): Engineering-Review-Request-Med-Interaction-Role-Name-Reconciliation-2026-05-23.md. KEY FINDING: README records NO slice-prefix carryforward decision (only dotted application-role realization) → prefixed refs are a defect, not a ratified choice → recommendation REVISED from Addendum 74's Option A to Option C (spec-conformant bare-name reconciliation, amend in place). STOP sustained — hard-floor item 6 (naming + amend-vs-forward-fix axes) + Codex consult DEFERRED (no OPENAI_API_KEY/binary in remote env). Awaiting Evans ratifier decision + Codex two-pass consult. Open remote PR #192 [CODEX-PENDING] = partial Option C (047 grant + read-path 048); reconcile per ratified option. PR 7+ Fastify handlers blocked until reconciliation lands.

areas.name: Pharmacy + Refill
areas.notes: feat(pharmacy): TLC-055 PRs C–K shipped 2026-05-13. /ready returns 200. Final 8% (Refill sub-slice) is now BLOCKED on SI-007 ratification (telecheck-app/docs/SI-007 v0.19, merged on main as 5ce0719 via PR #132 on 2026-05-14 after 18 Codex pre-ratification rounds; awaiting spec-corpus Engineering Lead + Clinical Lead + Pharmacy Lead sign-offs → Promotion Ledger P-013 → CDM v1.4 §4.17 Refill + §4.18 Dispensing + §4.19 Shipment + AUDIT_EVENTS v5.4 + DOMAIN_EVENTS in-place amendments). See AI_Service_Rollout_24h_Status_2026-05-14.md Addendum 3.
